pets.name: Mochi
pets.description: Mochi is a playful, energetic Shiba Inu who loves outdoor adventures and cuddles. Vaccinated, neutered, and microchipped.

pets.name: Luna
pets.description: Luna is a gentle, affectionate Scottish Fold who enjoys lounging and playing with feather toys. Fully vaccinated.

pets.name: Biscuit
pets.description: Biscuit is a sweet rescue puppy looking for his forever home. Very sociable and great with kids.

pets.name: Nala
pets.description: Nala is an active, curious Bengal cat who needs an experienced owner. Spayed and vaccinated.

pets.name: Cooper
pets.description: Cooper is a lovable Beagle with a great nose and a bigger heart. House-trained and vaccinated.

pets.name: Snowball
pets.description: Snowball is a fluffy Holland Lop rabbit who is incredibly sociable and loves to be handled.

pets.name: Mango
pets.description: Mango is a vibrant, playful Sun Conure who loves interaction and can learn simple tricks.

pets.name: Shadow
pets.description: Shadow is a majestic Maine Coon rescue looking for a loving, patient family. Neutered and healthy.
